ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_nr" INTEGER /* Subject number assigned for the experiment */,
  "contrast_group" TEXT /* Contrast group the subject belongs to */,
  "iat_order" TEXT /* Order of IATs for the subject */,
  "block_order_1" TEXT /* Order of the first block of trials */,
  "block_order_2" TEXT /* Order of the second block of trials */,
  "color_counter" TEXT /* Color counter for the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Language proficiency */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject gave consent to participate */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the subject is still active in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., image, sound, text) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block in the experiment */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of the block (e.g., practice, test) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "sequence_order" INTEGER /* Order of the block in the experiment */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Additional conditions or notes for the block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., 'm', 'c') */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the response */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the response was correct */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the subject in their response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., color, shape) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
